name: chrX_Xq28_X_transposed_region_XTR
description: Xq28 distal X-transposed region (XTR), a ~3.5 Mb block duplicated from chrX to chrYp11.2 in the human-chimp lineage ~5 Mya. The XTR is one of the largest interchromosomal SDs in the genome and is the major source of X-Y gene conversion. PAR-like in identity (>98%) but not recombining in male meiosis.

architecture.internal_structure: ~3.5 Mb X-to-Y transposed block including PCDH11X/Y, TGIF2LX/Y; mostly heterochromatinized on Y; ongoing X-Y gene conversion.

related_diseases: X-Y gene-conversion artefacts in variant callers
